value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI that transforms structured resume data into polished PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, and Markdown formats, with pluggable templates and AI-powered resume review and optimization.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory, supporting cognitive operations, plain-markdown storage, local embeddings, and HNSW semantic search, benchmarked on LongMemEval.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and MCP server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating major AI providers behind a single interface.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: Flappy Bird clone built with JavaFX and Java 21, showcasing data-oriented design and automated native builds for all major desktop platforms.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with a command-line interface, designed for exploring game logic and chess AI algorithms in Python.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal user interface, written in Rust.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Single-binary Rust tool for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, with no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, featuring modular design, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting data quantity as a key bottleneck in deep learning.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, supporting Homebrew/apt, per-language version managers, and one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall with semantic embeddings.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go library for durable execution: wrap existing functions to add ledgers, workers, and queues over user-owned storage.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding extension for Neovim, enabling spoken intent to drive code edits directly in the editor.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered tool for generating GitHub profile metrics, SVG visualizations, project classification, and README content as a CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementations of OpenAI Gymnasium environments for reinforcement learning research.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI and crate for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers, with GitHub Action support.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI tool that converts a blog post into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn posts.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, scaling sandboxed agents with metrics and NGAC policy enforcement.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: Undergraduate thesis on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, written in TeX.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Workspace for observable language models where every hidden state is a readable word distribution, featuring a CLI for tracing, causal probing, and faithfulness coverage.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Drop-in stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning workflows.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally for secure idea management.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using customizable Jinja2 template packs and supporting SSE streaming.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits in a single static binary.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README with auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct, cloud-free control of Zigbee devices by AI agents.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, containing basic JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Community-focused Android trading app using Clean Architecture and MVVM, enabling peer-to-peer item exchanges with robust mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I architect end-to-end systems—Rust and Go are my tools for streaming agent SDKs, local-first memory engines, and AI-native workflows. Recent work: saige (unified AI agent server) and mnemonist (semantic memory CLI). Based in Austin, always building from first principles.
